verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلصَّٰٓفَّٰتِ صَفًّۭا
verses.text: By the ones who line up in lines,
and the shouters of a shout,
and the reciters of a reminder!
Surely your God is one,

verses.quran_arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَٰرِقِ
verses.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth, and of whatever is between them, and Lord of the Easts.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ
verses.text: Surely We have made the sky of this world appear enticing by means of the splendor of the stars,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لۡكَوَاكِبِ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا  اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لۡكَوَاكِبِ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبَ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven by adorning the planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lowest heaven with an adornment, the planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةِ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةِ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لْكَوَاكِبِۖ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنْي۪ا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لْكَوَاكِبِۖ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

verses.text: and (We have made them) a (means of) protection from every rebelling satan.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍۢ
verses.text: They do not listen to the exalted Assembly,

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لۡمَلَإِ اِ۬لۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لۡمَلَإِ اِ۬لۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot eavesdrop on the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لْمَلَإِ اِ۬لْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لْمَلَإِ اِ۬لَاعْل۪ىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

verses.text: but they are pelted from every side, driven off – for them (there is) punishment forever –

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌۭ ثَاقِبٌۭ
verses.text: except for the one who snatches a word, and then a piercing flame pursues him.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَٰهُم مِّن طِينٍۢ لَّازِبٍۭ
verses.text: So ask them for a pronouncement: ‘Are they a stronger creation, or those (others) whom We have created?’ Surely We created them from sticky clay.
But you are amazed when they ridicule,

competing_variants.variant_english: Nay, you marveled (O Muhammad), and they mock.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنِي أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ، قَالَ هَيْتَ لَكَ قَالَ وَإِنَّمَا نَقْرَؤُهَا كَمَا عُلِّمْنَاهَا ‏{‏مَثْوَاهُ‏}‏ مُقَامُهُ ‏{‏أَلْفَيَا‏}‏ وَجَدَا ‏{‏أَلْفَوْا آبَاءَهُمْ‏}‏ ‏{‏أَلْفَيْنَا‏}‏ وَعَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ ‏{‏بَلْ عَجِبْتَ وَيَسْخَرُونَ‏}‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Abu Wail: `Abdullah bin Mas`ud recited "Haita laka (Come you)," and added, "We recite it as we were taught it." [omitted from the original translation: '{mathwahu} means his residence; {alfaya} means they found; {alfaw aba'ahum} (they found their fathers), {alfayna} (we found). And from Ibn Mas'ud: {Bal 'ajibta wa yaskharun} (Nay, you marveled, and they mock).']

verses.text: and, when they are reminded, do not take heed,
and, when they see a sign, ridicule,

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: and say, ‘This is nothing but clear magic.

verses.quran_arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: When we are dead, and turned to dust and bones, shall we indeed be raised up?

canonical_variants.arabic: أَٰ۟ذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً إِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?

canonical_variants.arabic: اَ۟ذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً اِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?

verses.text: And our fathers of old (too)?’
Say: ‘Yes, and you will be humbled.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: (For) it will only be a single shout, and suddenly they will see,
and say, ‘Woe to us! This is the Day of Judgment.’

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: ‘This is the Day of Decision, which you called a lie.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: Gather those who have done evil, and their wives, and what they used to serve,

verses.quran_arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: instead of God, and guide them to the path of the Furnace.
And stop them (there), (for) they are to be questioned:
“What is (the matter) with you (that) you do you not help each other?”
No! Today they are resigned.’
Some of them will approach others asking each other questions.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: They will say, ‘Surely you used to come to us from the right (side).’
They will say, ‘No! You were not believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًۭا طَٰغِينَ
verses.text: We had no authority over you. No! You were a people who transgressed insolently.

verses.quran_arabic: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
verses.text: So the word of our Lord has proved true against us. Surely we are indeed tasting (it).
We made you err (because) we were in error.’
Surely on that Day they will be partners in the punishment.
Surely in this way We deal with the sinners.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
verses.text: Surely they – when it was said to them, ‘(There is) no god but God,’ they became arrogant,

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍۢ مَّجْنُونٍۭ
verses.text: and said, ‘Are we to abandon our gods for a possessed poet?’
‘No! He has brought the truth and confirmed the envoys.
Justice you will indeed taste the painful punishment,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: and you will not be repaid (for anything) except what you have done.’
– Except for the devoted servants of God.
Those – for them (there will be) a known provision
(of) fruits, and they will be honored
in Gardens of Bliss,
on couches, facing each other,
(and) a cup from a flowing spring will be passed around among them –
white, delicious to the drinkers,

verses.quran_arabic: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌۭ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ
verses.text: (there is) no ill effect in it, nor do they become drunk from it.
With them (there will be maidens) restraining (their) glances, wide-eyed,
as if they were hidden eggs.
Some of them will approach others asking each other questions.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ قَآئِلٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌۭ
verses.text: One of them will say, ‘Surely I had a comrade,
who used to say, “Are you indeed one of the confirmers?

verses.quran_arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
verses.text: When we are dead, and turned to dust and bones, shall we indeed be judged?”’

canonical_variants.arabic: أَٰ۟ذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً إِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be called to account?’”

canonical_variants.arabic: أَ۟ذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً اِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be called to account?’”

verses.text: (Another) will say, ‘Are you looking (down)?’
So he looks (down) and sees him in the midst of the Furnace.
He will say, ‘By God! You nearly brought me to ruin.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ
verses.text: Were it not for the blessing of my Lord, I (too) would have been one of those brought forward (to the punishment).
So do we not die,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: except for our first death, and are we not punished?
Surely this – it indeed is the great triumph!
Let the workers work for something like this!’

verses.quran_arabic: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌۭ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.text: Is that better as a reception, or the tree of al-Zaqqūm?
Surely We have made it a test for the evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌۭ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: It is a tree which comes forth from the root of the Furnace.
Its fruits are like the heads of the satans,

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَءَاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.text: and they eat from it, and fill their bellies from it.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًۭا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Then on (top of) it they have a drink of boiling (water).
Then their return is to the Furnace.
Surely they found their fathers astray,
and they run in their footsteps.
Certainly most of those of old went astray before them,
even though We sent warners among them.
See how the end was for those who were warned
– except for the devoted servants of God.
Certainly Noah called on Us, and excellent indeed were the responders!
We rescued him and his family from great distress,
and We made his descendants – they were the survivors.
We left (this blessing) upon him among the later (generations):
‘Peace (be) upon Noah among all peoples!’
In this way We repay the doers of good.
Surely he was one of Our believing servants.
Then We drowned the others.
Surely Abraham was indeed of his party:
When he came to his Lord with a sound heart,

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: when he said to his father and his people, ‘What do you serve?
(Is it) a lie – gods other than God – you desire?
What do you think about the Lord of the worlds?’
And he took a look at the stars,
and said, ‘Surely I am sick.’
So they turned away from him, withdrawing.

verses.quran_arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: But he turned to their gods, and said, ‘Do you not eat?
What is (the matter) with you (that) you do not speak?’
So he turned on them, striking (them) with the right (hand).
Then they came running to him.
He said, ‘Do you serve what you carve,
when God created you and what you make?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَٰنًۭا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: They said, ‘Build a building for him, and cast him into the blazing (Fire)!’
They intended a plot against him, but We brought them down.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely I am going to my Lord. He will guide me.
My Lord, grant me one of the righteous.’
So We gave him the good news of a forbearing boy.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: When he had reached the (age of) running with him, he said, ‘My son! Surely I saw in a dream that I am going to sacrifice you. So look, what do you think?’ He said, ‘My father! Do what you are commanded. You will find me, if God pleases, one of the patient.’
When they both had submitted, and he had laid him face down,
We called out to him, ‘Abraham!

verses.quran_arabic: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Now you have confirmed the vision. Surely in this way We repay the doers of good.
Surely this – it indeed was the clear test.’
And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,
and left (this blessing) on him among the later (generations):
‘Peace (be) upon Abraham!’
In this way We repay the doers of good.
Surely he was one of Our believing servants.
And We gave him the good news of Isaac, a prophet, one of the righteous.

verses.quran_arabic: وَبَٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌۭ وَظَالِمٌۭ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌۭ
verses.text: We blessed him and Isaac, and some of their descendants are doers of good, and some clearly do themselves evil.
Certainly We bestowed favor on Moses and Aaron,
and We rescued them and their people from the great distress.
We helped them, and they were the victors.
We gave them both the clarifying Book,
and guided them to the straight path,
and left (this blessing) on both of them among the later (generations):
‘Peace (be) upon Moses and Aaron!’
In this way We repay the doers of good.
Surely they were two of Our believing servants.
Surely Elijah was indeed one of the envoys:
When he said to his people, ‘Will you not guard (yourselves)?
Do you call on Baal, and abandon the best of creators
– God – your Lord and the Lord of your fathers of old?’

canonical_variants.english: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your ancient fathers?”
Allah is your Lord and the Lord of your ancient fathers?”

verses.text: Yet they called him a liar. Surely they will indeed be brought forward (to the punishment)
– except for the devoted servants of God.
And We left (this blessing) on him among the later (generations):
‘Peace (be) upon Elijah!’
In this way We repay the doers of good.
Surely he was one of Our believing servants.
Surely Lot was indeed one of the envoys:
When We rescued him and his family – all (of them) –
except for an old woman among those who stayed behind.
Then We destroyed the others.
Surely you indeed pass near them in the morning
and in the night. Will you not understand?
Surely Jonah was indeed one of the envoys:
When he ran away to the loaded ship,
and cast lots, but was one of the losers.
So the fish swallowed him, seeing that he was to blame.
Were it not that he was one of those who glorified (God),

verses.quran_arabic: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: he would indeed have remained in its belly until the Day when they are raised up.
But We tossed him on the desert (shore) while he was (still) sick,
and We caused a gourd tree to grow over him.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ
verses.text: We sent him to a hundred thousand, or more,
and they believed. So We gave them enjoyment (of life) for a time.
Ask them for a pronouncement: ‘Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَٰثًۭا وَهُمْ شَٰهِدُونَ
verses.text: Or did We create the angels female while they were witnesses?’
Is it not a fact that out of their own lie they indeed say,
‘God has begotten’? Surely they are liars indeed!
Has He chosen daughters over sons?
What is (the matter) with you? How do you judge?
Will you not take heed?
Or do you have any clear authority?
Bring your Book, if you are truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًۭا ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: They have fabricated an affiliation between Him and the jinn. Yet certainly the jinn know that they will indeed be brought forward (to the punishment)
– glory to God above what they allege! –
except for the devoted servants of God.
Surely you and what you serve –
you will not tempt (anyone to rebellion) against Him,
except for the one who is (destined) to burn in the Furnace.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌۭ مَّعْلُومٌۭ
verses.text: (There is) not one of us who does not have an assigned position.
Surely we – we indeed are the ones who line up,
and surely we – we indeed are the ones who glorify (God).
If they were to say,

verses.quran_arabic: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: ‘If (only) we had a reminder from those of old,
we would indeed have been the devoted servants of God.’
Yet they have disbelieved in it. Soon they will know!
Certainly Our word has (already) gone forth to Our servants, the envoys.
Surely they – they indeed are the ones who will be helped.
Surely Our army – they indeed are the victors.
So turn away from them for a time,
and observe them. Soon they will observe!
Do they seek to hurry Our punishment?

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: When it comes down in their (own) courtyard, (how) evil the morning will be for those who were warned!
So turn from away them for a time,
and observe (them). Soon they will observe!

verses.quran_arabic: سُبْحَٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.text: Glory to your Lord, Lord of honor, above what they allege!
Peace (be) upon the envoys,
and praise (be) to God, Lord of the worlds!
